```{r}
#| label: tbl-surgical-procedure-rates
#| tbl-cap: !expr 'sR$`tbl-surgical-procedure-rates`$`tbl-cap`'
#| tbl-cap-location: top

reference_data |>
  neoipcr::get_ref_surgery_rate_table() |>
  dplyr::rename(
    !!sR$table_headers$n := "n",
    !!sR$table_headers$pooled := "pooled",
    !!sR$table_headers$q1 := "q1",
    !!sR$table_headers$q2 := "q2",
    !!sR$table_headers$q3 := "q3") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    pro_cat = dplyr::case_match(
      .data$pro_cat,
      "overall" ~ sR$`tbl-surgical-procedure-rates`$overall,
      "abdominal_surgery" ~ sR$`tbl-surgical-procedure-rates`$abdominal_surgery,
      "neurosurgery" ~ sR$`tbl-surgical-procedure-rates`$neurosurgery,
      "inguinal_hernia_surgery" ~ sR$`tbl-surgical-procedure-rates`$inguinal_hernia_surgery,
      "cardiac_and_large_vessel_surgery" ~ sR$`tbl-surgical-procedure-rates`$cardiac_and_large_vessel_surgery,
      "lung_pleural_space_thoracic_surgery" ~ sR$`tbl-surgical-procedure-rates`$lung_pleural_space_thoracic_surgery,
      "oesophageal_surgery" ~ sR$`tbl-surgical-procedure-rates`$oesophageal_surgery,
      "other" ~ sR$other,
      "not_surgery" ~ sR$`tbl-surgical-procedure-rates`$not_surgery,
      "to_be_categorised" ~ sR$`tbl-surgical-procedure-rates`$to_be_categorised)) |>
  gt(rowname_col = "pro_cat") |>
  sub_missing() |>
  gt::tab_options(
    latex.use_longtable = TRUE,
    table.width = pct(100),
    table.font.size = 13,
    footnotes.marks = "extended"
  ) |>
  fmt_number(
    columns = !sR$table_headers$n,
    decimals = 1,
    sep_mark = sR$digit_group_separator,
    min_sep_threshold = 2,
    locale = locale_gt) |>
  fmt_integer(
    columns = sR$table_headers$n,
    sep_mark = sR$digit_group_separator,
    min_sep_threshold = 2) |>
  cols_width(
    stub() ~ pct(50),
    sR$table_headers$n ~ pct(15),
    sR$table_headers$pooled ~ pct(14),
    sR$table_headers$q1 ~ pct(7),
    sR$table_headers$q2 ~ pct(7),
    sR$table_headers$q3 ~ pct(7)
  ) |>
  tab_spanner(
    label = sR$`tbl-surgical-procedure-rates`$`rate_name`,
    columns = tidyselect::any_of(
     c(
     sR$table_headers$pooled,
     sR$table_headers$q1,
     sR$table_headers$q2,
     sR$table_headers$q3)),
    id = "procedure_rate"
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = list(
      cells_column_spanners(),
      cells_column_labels(),
      cells_row_groups()
    )
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = md(
      paste0(
        "$$\\text{",
        sR$`tbl-surgical-procedure-rates`$`rate_name`,
        "} = \\frac{\\text{",
        sR$`tbl-surgical-procedure-rates`$`rate_numerator`,
        "}}{\\text{",
        sR$`tbl-surgical-procedure-rates`$`rate_denominator`,
        "}} \\times ",
        format_integer(100),
        "$$"
      )),
    locations = cells_column_spanners(spanners = "procedure_rate")
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = sprintf(
      sR$`tbl-surgical-procedure-rates`$n_footnote,
      sR$table_headers$n),
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = sR$table_headers$n)) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = sprintf(
      sR$`tbl-surgical-procedure-rates`$pooled_footnote,
      sR$table_headers$pooled),
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = sR$table_headers$pooled)) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = sprintf(
      sR$`tbl-surgical-procedure-rates`$quartile_footnote,
      sR$table_headers$q1,
      sR$table_headers$q2,
      sR$table_headers$q3,
      sprintf("%i%s", 25L, sR$percent_symbol),
      sprintf("%i%s", 50L, sR$percent_symbol),
      sprintf("%i%s", 75L, sR$percent_symbol)
      ),
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = c(
      sR$table_headers$q1,
      sR$table_headers$q2,
      sR$table_headers$q3)))

```
